channel.title: Posts on Luke Raybould
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Luke Raybould

item.title: Welcome!
item.description: Hi! I’m Luke, a software developer and Physics graduate from the West Midlands, UK. I’ve created this small personal website to host some blog posts about projects, programming, and other things that interest me! For a bit more about me, take a look at the About page.
